title: Koyamacalia cyclota
taxonomy: Koyamacalia cyclota is a member of the plant family Compositae, more commonly known as Asteraceae. This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, including daisies, sunflowers, and asters. As a member of the Asteraceae family, Koyamacalia cyclota shares characteristics with other plants in this group, such as composite flowers and a similar seed structure. Koyamacalia cyclota is further classified as a genus within the tribe Senecioneae. The exact classification of Koyamacalia cyclota may be subject to revision based on ongoing botanical research.
